profile.name: Samih Elkhider
profile.title: Product & Business Development Expert
profile.bio: A results-driven Technologist with over 10 years of experience building and growing technology products across startups and multinational companies. I enjoy turning ideas into scalable products that solve real business problems and create measurable impact. My background spans product strategy, product development, presales and go-to-market execution with strong experience in AI-driven solutions including ML, Software Development, Telecom and Computer Vision.

publications.title: Face Recognition using different substance LDA vs PCA

lab.title: Maison Sale
lab.short: Luxury resale marketplace with AI visual search, real-time bidding, and a watchOS companion app.
lab.full: A luxury resale marketplace for iOS with a full onboarding flow, AI-powered visual search, real-time bidding, and an embedded watchOS companion app. Built with SwiftUI, featuring Figma-aligned design tokens and persistent navigation.

lab.title: Floom
lab.short: Personal finance app with budgeting, bill tracking, milestones, and biometric app lock via Keychain.
lab.full: A personal finance app for tracking budgets, bills, and milestones. Features SwiftData persistence, biometric gate via Keychain, secure profile storage, and a clean tab-based navigation with dashboard analytics.

lab.title: Medical Insurance Hub
lab.short: End-to-end medical insurance platform documentation — BRD, BPMN flows, ERD data model, and Jira backlog management.
lab.full: Comprehensive medical insurance platform documentation including BRD, BPMN process flows, ERD data model, UAT test cases, Figma wireframe briefs, and a full Jira backlog with automated import scripts for the SHH project.

lab.title: bits3 Corporate Website
lab.short: Bilingual corporate site with a headless CMS dashboard, dark/light mode, and fully editable content.
lab.full: A bilingual (EN/AR) corporate website with Next.js 15 frontend, Strapi 5 headless CMS, dark/light theming, Docker deployment, and a custom admin dashboard for managing portfolio, blog, team, and services content.

lab.title: Online Avenues
lab.short: Product wireframes and UX flows for an online education platform.
lab.full: Product wireframes and UX flows for an online education platform, covering user journeys, screen layouts, and interaction patterns for web and mobile experiences.

lab.title: Alpha Gold
lab.short: Fintech platform to trade real and virtual gold B2C & C2C — from 1g to 1 KG.
lab.full: A fintech platform enabling consumers to trade real and virtual gold in B2C and C2C models, supporting transactions from 1 gram up to 1 kilogram.

lab.title: Clinical
lab.short: A fully virtual medical consultation platform.
lab.full: A fully virtual medical consultation platform connecting patients and clinicians for remote diagnosis, follow-up, and care delivery.

lab.title: Hadreen
lab.short: A laundry app to serve you with a click of a button.
lab.full: An on-demand laundry app that picks up, cleans, and delivers your clothes — booked and tracked with a single tap.

lab.title: Qafila
lab.short: Premium e-commerce platform to get your exclusive luxury items.
lab.full: A premium e-commerce platform curated for exclusive luxury items — discovery, checkout, and delivery built for high-end retail.

lab.title: Saerha
lab.short: First Saudi-made AI mobile app that scans anything and finds the best deal around your area.
lab.full: The first Saudi-made AI mobile app that scans any product or item and surfaces the best deals available near you — price comparison powered by computer vision.
